text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an outing together, Ines Fujin and I run into
Mr. C.B. in the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I saw your last scrimmage! I couldn't believe
my eyes when you came charging in from behind!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Really? Hehe. I'm glad you enjoyed my
performance.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to surprise the crowd like that too. Like,
how about if... instead of pacing myself like a
normal front runner, I just went full pelt from start
to finish?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin chats away to Mr. C.B with a starstruck
twinkle in her eye. Watching the two of them, I
can't help but think...
choice_data_list:
You're the very picture of an admiring
underclassman...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Well, how could I not be?! C.B. is my upperclassman! I look up to her, and I want to show it properly!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wait, do you have time to be standing around
talking like this? If you have any plans or...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I'm just doing some shopping. I thought it might
be nice to cook for myself more often, so I'm here
to pick out some quality produce.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
But since I don't usually go to the trouble, I
haven't had much luck finding what's on my list so
far. I was just wandering about when you bumped
into me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's getting late, though, isn't it? Some of the
shops will probably start closing soon.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're right. Well, that's not good.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Um, if you don't mind, I could help you with that!
As your underclassman, I'd like to offer you my
support!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I had no idea you could buy breadcrumbs
from the butcher. And I bought one of these
croquettes I've heard so much about too...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, look at these flowers. Apparently, they
were planted by some local elementary school
kids. How pretty.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second, C.B.! Your croquette is still in the
fryer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wow, C.B. is a bit of a... a free spirit, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh, she's gone again... C.B.?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Look at these. It's a pair of retro roller skates
from that toy store over there. I've never seen
skates this old before.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You bought these?! You shouldn't waste your
money like that—not when you still have
ingredients to buy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While chasing after the free-spirited Mr. C.B.,
Ines Fujin's nervous disposition gradually fades
away until she's practically back to normal...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Ines, look! Roasted sweet potatoes!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No sweet potatoes for you! You just had that
croquette, didn't you? You won't have any space
for dinner!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Gasp! I'm so, so, so sorry! I can't believe I just spoke to an upperclassman like that...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: ...Pfft. Aha ha! You're a funny person, Ines.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
It's totally fine. Don't worry about it. I don't go in
for social norms like the whole "act proper in
front of your upperclassmen" thing.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I approach my races the same way. Going against
the norm is how you seize greater heights.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Roger that! Thanks for the insight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Ines panicked for a moment after
unwittingly acting like a big sister to her
upperclassman, everything seems to have turned
out all right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In fact, it looks like that behavior might actually
be opening up new opportunities for her.
choice_data_list: Let's take your big sister act up a notch!
Today, let's be free spirits like C.B.!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Ines Fujin that Mister C.B. is right, and it's
about time she unleashed her real personality in
full force!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! But don't you think that'd be a little too...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good to me. But I think I'm going to make
a pretty unruly little sister, you know?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, I'd like one of those potatoes please.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ack, what did I say about leaving space for
dinner?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Don't just stand there, Trainer! Help me out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even in front of her upperclassman, Ines Fujin
remains entirely herself. It looks like this was a
great learning experience for her!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I guess we're eating out for dinner tonight.
I'll leave the cooking for tomorrow—wouldn't
want to pass up this opportunity to hang out with
you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Does that actually constitute going against social
norms?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Who knows. But it's always fun to follow through
on your desires in the moment.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Follow through on your desires...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...I know just the thing, C.B.! For dinner, let's have
a bowl of ramen! And to top it off...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'll race you to the restaurant!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
So that's what you desire right now. Hehe, you're
on, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch the two of them dashing off so
earnestly into the evening, I can't help feeling
that they're actually kind of similar.
